creator: matthias+freebsd+bugzilla@harz.de
text:
Hi all,

finally this turned out to be an asterisk pjsip bug

https://issues.asterisk.org/jira/browse/ASTERISK-26186

This bug is hit only in multihomed enviroments.
And it is hit only from time to time.

I moved back to chan_sip and now every thing works as expected.

I think this Report can be closed as this is not freebsd related.

Many thanks for your Support.
